title: nephrodium spinulosum f. fructuosum
intro: Nephrodium spinulosum f. fructuosum is a fern species known for its unique appearance and medicinal properties. It is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae, characterized by its frond with a distinctive rounded shape and wavy edges. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve pain, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Nephrodium spinulosum f. fructuosum, typically in the form of infusions or decoctions, are used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions.
